Operational Alerts.raw_headline: The Plant shutdown intimation is hereby submitted.
Operational Alerts.headline: The Plant shutdown intimation is hereby submitted.
Operational Alerts.pdf_text: HOC/BSE/Plant shutdown/2026 14th March, 2026 BSE Ltd., Pheroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Mumbai – 400 001 Sir Scrip Code: 500449 Sub: Temporary Shutdown of Phenol Plant of HOCL Ref 1: Letter No.HOC/BSE/Plant shutdown/2026 dated 09th March 2026 Ref 2: Letter No.HOC/BSE/Plant shutdown/2026 dated 11th March 2026. In compliance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III Part A Para B of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and in continuation to our earlier intimation dt. 09.03.2026, corporate announcement is hereby given that pursuant to the decision of Government of India directing all Public Sector Oil manufacturing companies to ensure that LPG procured or marketed by Public Sector Companies is supplied exclusively to domestic LPG consumers, BPCL being the bulk LPG supplier of HOCL has discontinued the LPG supply. LPG supplied by BPCL is the primary source for supplying feedstock to HOCL and any disruption in LPG would directly affect the plant operations. HOCL, Kochi unit in the state of Kerala (Phenol Complex) is the only manufacturing unit of the company which is engaged in manufacturing of Phenol, Acetone, Hydrogen Peroxide. Due to the present force majeure condition resulting in the discontinuation of LPG supply from BPCL, the Company has now compelled to undertake a temporary shutdown of the operations of the Phenol Plant from today 14.03.2026 afternoon onwards. The temporary shutdown constitutes a force majeure event arising from a the directions issued by the Government of India and is entirely beyond the control of the Company. The likely impact of Force Majeure on the company which is currently an ongoing event cannot be estimated at this point of time. The Hydrogen Peroxide plant of the company will continue to operate as usual. We are closely monitoring the situation and any material updates including the reopening of the plant will be intimated to BSE. Thanking you. For Hindustan Organic Chemicals Ltd. Subramonian H Company Se

Regulatory & BSE Queries.pdf_text: Date: March 14, 2026 BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited P.J. Towers, Exchange Plaza, 5th Floor, Plot No. C/1, G Dalal Street, Block, Bandra - Kurla Complex, Mumbai- 400 001 Bandra (E), Mumbai - 400 051 Scrip Code: 543386 Symbol: FINOPB Dear Sir/Madam, Subject: Update on business performance of the Bank We hereby submit an update on the business performance of the Fino Payments Bank Limited (“Bank”) as below: Trust of Bharat Grows: The Bank has recorded the highest ever Total Deposit Balance of ~ Rs. 2,900 crores. The Bank has achieved a significant milestone in its growth journey, reflects growing customer trust and engagement:  Deposit balances have grown by nearly 9% over the past two weeks, reaching an all-time high of ~Rs 2,900 crores as on March 13, 2026.  ~ 1.5 lakh new banking accounts have been opened since February 27, 2026, averaging nearly 10,000 new accounts per day. The milestone indicates the continued trust placed by customers in the Bank’s simple, secure and technology-enabled banking services, supported by the Bank’s new core banking platform, which enables seamless banking experiences. Through its merchant-led phygital banking model, backed by strong digital infrastructure, the Bank continues to expand its reach to underserved and underbanked communities, enabling millions of customers across Bharat to access formal banking services conveniently. “We thank the people of Bharat for banking with us and for their continued trust in the Bank. We also express gratitude to our business associates and business correspondent (merchant) network for their continued support.” The Bank remains committed to strengthening financial inclusion and continuing its mission of bringing simple, accessible and reliable banking services to every corner of Bharat. This disclosure will also be available on the Bank’s website at www.fino.bank.in. Kindly take the same on your record. Thanking You, Yours faithfully, For, Fino Payments Bank Limited, Basavra

NSE Symbol: SHEMAROO Scrip Code: 538685 Dear Sir/Madam, Re: Shemaroo Entertainment Limited - ISIN: INE363M01019 Sub: Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Dear Sir/Madam, The Company sought shareholders’ approval for the issuance of equity shares to the promoter/promoter group on a preferential basis through a postal ballot notice dated February 11, 2026. The e-voting period commenced on February 12, 2026 and concluded on March 13, 2026. In the said postal ballot notice, the Company had disclosed the pre- and post-issue shareholding pattern (point (d) of the explanatory statement) pursuant to the proposed preferential issue. Board Decisions.pdf_text: 14 March, 2026 National Stock Exchange of India Limited BSE Limited Exchange Plaza, Bandra Kurla Complex, Mumbai P.J. Towers, Dalal Street, Mumbai Kind Attn: Manager, Listing Department Kind Attn: Manager, Listing Department Stock Code – SONATSOFTW Stock Code - 532221 Dear Sirs/Madam, SUB: DISCLOSURE UNDER REGULATION 30 OF THE SEBI (LISTING OBLIGATIONS AND DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENTS) REGULATIONS, 2015 – CHANGES OF SENIOR MANAGEMENT PERSONNEL With reference to above cited regulation, Mr. Balaji Kumar is appointed as Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO) of Sonata Software Limited (the ‘Company’) with effect from 14th March, 2026, responsible for People and Talent function globally. He will be based out of the Company’s Corporate Office at Bengaluru, India. The drug is administered orally, is therefore expected to improve the treatment compliance of patients and to meet the unmet treatment needs in the field of CKD anaemia.
